briefdescription.para: BbramWriteAesKey function writes AES key defined by macro XNVM_BBRAM_AES_KEY in BBRAM.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the Aes key write successful
XST_FAILURE if the Aes key write failed

briefdescription.para: Validate the input string contains valid AES key.

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - On valid input AES key string.
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid length of the input string.
XST_FAILURE - On non hexadecimal character in string

briefdescription.para: BbramWriteUsrData function writes user data defined by macro XNVM_BBRAM_USER_DATA in BBRAM.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the user data write successful
XST_FAILURE if the user data write failed

briefdescription.para: BbramReadUsrData function reads user data present in BBRAM.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the user data read successful
XST_FAILURE if the user data read failed

briefdescription.para: BbramLockUsrData function locks user data written in BBRAM.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the user data lock successful
XST_FAILURE if the user data lock failed

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the function to provision Configuration limiter parameters.

detaileddescription.para: Main function to call the Bbram AES key write example function.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the BBRAM programming failed.

simplesect.para: By default PLM does not include the NVM client code, it is disabled by a macro PLM_NVM_EXCLUDE. So, to run this client application successfully we need to enable NVM code in PLM before executing this application.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the BBRAM programming failed.

inbodydescription.para: If any error occurs during programming of any SLR, keys in all the SLRs get zeroized. User has to reload the example
